parameters.query:
SELECT 
  dc.id,
  dc.content,
  dc.chunk_index,
  dc.document_id,
  dc.metadata,
  dc.chunk_type,
  dc.ocr_text,
  dc.caption,
  dc.image_summary,
  dc.image_url,
  d.title as document_title,
  1 - (dc.embedding <=> '{{JSON.stringify($json.data[0].embedding)}}'::vector) AS similarity
FROM document_chunks dc
JOIN documents d ON dc.document_id = d.id
WHERE d.workspace_id = '{{$('Extract Input').item.json.workspaceId}}'
  AND d.status = 'ready'
  {{if($('Extract Input').item.json.documentId, `AND dc.document_id = '${$('Extract Input').item.json.documentId}'`, '')}}
  AND 1 - (dc.embedding <=> '{{JSON.stringify($json.data[0].embedding)}}'::vector) > {{$('Extract Input').item.json.threshold}}
ORDER BY similarity DESC
LIMIT {{$('Extract Input').item.json.topK}};
